allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/utils/notificationService.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('OK notificationService loads, exports:', Object.keys\(m\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/app.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('OK app loads'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/app.js'\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('OK'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); console.error\(e.stack\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($pids\) { foreach \($p in $pids\) { Write-Output "Stopping PID $p \($\(\(Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on port 5000" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("PID " + $_.OwningProcess + " = " + $proc.ProcessName + " | started " + $proc.StartTime\) } } else { Write-Output "port 5000 free" })

PowerShell($goodChild = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\); if \(-not $goodChild\) { "no server on 5000"; exit }; $goodNodemon = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$goodChild"\).ParentProcessId; "keeping server PID $goodChild \(nodemon $goodNodemon\)"; $nodes = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'velora-house' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'nodemon|server\\.js' }; foreach \($n in $nodes\) { if \($n.ProcessId -ne $goodChild -and $n.ProcessId -ne $goodNodemon\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $n.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed stray $\($n.ProcessId\)" } catch { "could not kill $\($n.ProcessId\)" } } })
Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { console.log\('Brevo:', typeof m.Brevo, Object.keys\(m.Brevo || {}\).slice\(0,30\)\); console.log\('BrevoClient:', typeof m.BrevoClient\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const c = new m.BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'x' }\); console.log\('client keys:', Object.keys\(c\).slice\(0,40\)\); console.log\('proto:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c\)\).slice\(0,40\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const c = new m.BrevoClient\({ apiKey: 'x' }\); const te = c.transactionalEmails; console.log\('te type:', typeof te\); console.log\('te proto:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(te\)\).slice\(0,40\)\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('@getbrevo/brevo'\).then\(m => { const sample = m.Brevo.SendSmtpEmail; console.log\(typeof sample\); const ex = new sample\(\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ex\)\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@getbrevo/brevo'\); console.log\('Brevo.SendSmtpEmail type:', typeof m.Brevo.SendSmtpEmail\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(\(\) => { const has = \(k\) => { const v = process.env[k]; return { set: !!v, length: v ? v.length : 0 }; }; console.log\('CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME:', has\('CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME'\)\); console.log\('CLOUDINARY_API_KEY:   ', has\('CLOUDINARY_API_KEY'\)\); console.log\('CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET:', has\('CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET'\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(\(\) => { const has = \(k\) => { const v = process.env[k]; return { set: !!v, length: v ? v.length : 0, firstChar: v ? v[0] : null, isNumeric: v ? /^\\d+$/.test\(v\) : false }; }; console.log\('CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME:', has\('CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME'\)\); console.log\('CLOUDINARY_API_KEY:   ', has\('CLOUDINARY_API_KEY'\)\); console.log\('CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET:', has\('CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET'\)\); }\);")
